specvec 0.2.0

specvec: Abundance-Aware Species and Community Embeddings

Source: R/specvec-package.R
specvec-package.Rd

Learns species and community embeddings from ecological co-occurrence data with abundance-aware weighting. Turns a long 'plot x species (x abundance)' table into species vectors and first-class community vectors, and ships a benchmark harness that scores embedding methods (correspondence analysis, pointwise mutual information, abundance-weighted PMI, and GloVe) on neutral ecological tasks. A method is a registered '(weighting, factorization)' pair, so new methods are added by registration rather than by copying code.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/gcol33/specvec

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/gcol33/specvec/issues
